Automod.name: antizalgo
Automod.desc: Toggles zalgo text filter. Usage: `f.automod antizalgo <enable|disable>`

Automod.name: add
Automod.desc: Adds a domain to the antilink whitelist.

Automod.name: remove
Automod.desc: Removes a domain from the whitelist.

Economy.name: color
Economy.desc: Changes your top role color if you own the Custom Color Perk.

Economy.name: title
Economy.desc: Sets your custom profile title if you own the Custom Title Perk.

Economy.name: balance
Economy.desc: Shows wallet and bank balances. Usage: `f.balance [@user]`

Economy.name: deposit
Economy.desc: Deposits coins to your bank. Usage: `f.deposit <amount | all>`

Economy.name: withdraw
Economy.desc: Withdraws coins from your bank. Usage: `f.withdraw <amount | all>`

Economy.name: work
Economy.desc: Works a shift to earn coins. Usage: `f.work`

Economy.name: mine
Economy.desc: Mines for ores. Usage: `f.mine` (requires Steel Pickaxe)

Economy.name: buy
Economy.desc: Buys an item from the shop. Usage: `f.buy <item_id>`

Economy.name: sell
Economy.desc: Sells items for coins. Usage: `f.sell <item_id> [amount | all]`

Economy.name: slots
Economy.desc: Spin the slot machine. Usage: `f.slots <bet | all>`

Economy.name: highlow
Economy.desc: Guess higher or lower. Usage: `f.highlow <bet | all>`

Economy.name: crime
Economy.desc: Commit a risky crime. Usage: `f.crime` (45min cooldown)

Economy.name: rob
Economy.desc: Steals coins from another user. Usage: `f.rob @user`

Economy.name: pay
Economy.desc: Transfer coins to another user. Usage: `f.pay @user <amount>`

Economy.name: cooldowns
Economy.desc: Shows all active economy cooldowns. Usage: `f.cooldowns`

Economy.name: water
Economy.desc: Waters crops to cut remaining time by 50%.

Fun.name: 8ball
Fun.desc: Ask the magic 8-ball a yes/no question. Usage: `f.8ball <question>`

Fun.name: say
Fun.desc: Make the bot say something.

Fun.name: joke
Fun.desc: Tells a random safe joke. Usage: `f.joke`

Fun.name: mock
Fun.desc: Mocks a message in SpOnGeBoB CaSe.

Fun.name: love
Fun.desc: Measures the love between two users.

Fun.name: list
Fun.desc: Lists the server's ragebait leaderboard. Usage: `f.rage list`

Fun.name: remove
Fun.desc: Removes rage points from a user. Usage: `f.rage remove @user <amount>`

Fun.name: set
Fun.desc: Sets a user's rage points. Usage: `f.rage set @user <amount>`

Fun.name: howgay
Fun.desc: Measures how gay a user is. Usage: `f.howgay [user]`

Fun.name: howaustic
Fun.desc: Measures how autistic a user is. Usage: `f.howaustic [user]`

Fun.name: iq
Fun.desc: Measures IQ (consistent per user per day). Usage: `f.iq [user]`

Fun.name: meme
Fun.desc: Fetches a random meme from Reddit. Usage: `f.meme`

Fun.name: cat
Fun.desc: Fetches a random cat image. Usage: `f.cat`

Fun.name: dog
Fun.desc: Fetches a random dog image. Usage: `f.dog`

Fun.name: coinflip
Fun.desc: Flips a coin. Usage: `f.coinflip`

Fun.name: roll
Fun.desc: Rolls a dice. Usage: `f.roll [sides]`

Fun.name: rps
Fun.desc: Rock-paper-scissors. Usage: `f.rps <rock|paper|scissors>`

Fun.name: choose
Fun.desc: Picks a random item from comma-separated choices. Usage: `f.choose opt1, opt2, ...`

Fun.name: fact
Fun.desc: Fetches a random interesting fact. Usage: `f.fact`

Fun.name: trivia
Fun.desc: Play a quick trivia game. Correct answers reward 100 coins (via Economy cog).

Fun.name: slap
Fun.desc: Slaps another user. Usage: `f.slap @user [reason]`

Fun.name: hug
Fun.desc: Hugs another user. Usage: `f.hug @user`

Fun.name: pat
Fun.desc: Pats another user. Usage: `f.pat @user`

Fun.name: kiss
Fun.desc: Kisses another user. Usage: `f.kiss @user`

Fun.name: cuddle
Fun.desc: Cuddles another user. Usage: `f.cuddle @user`

Fun.name: bite
Fun.desc: Bites another user. Usage: `f.bite @user`

Fun.name: punch
Fun.desc: Punches another user. Usage: `f.punch @user`

Fun.name: poke
Fun.desc: Pokes another user. Usage: `f.poke @user`

Fun.name: lick
Fun.desc: Licks another user. Usage: `f.lick @user`

Fun.name: boop
Fun.desc: Boops another user's nose. Usage: `f.boop @user`

Fun.name: tickle
Fun.desc: Tickles another user. Usage: `f.tickle @user`

Fun.name: wave
Fun.desc: Waves to another user. Usage: `f.wave @user`

Fun.name: highfive
Fun.desc: High-fives another user. Usage: `f.highfive @user`

Fun.name: cry
Fun.desc: Cries, optionally because of another user. Usage: `f.cry [@user]`

Fun.name: laugh
Fun.desc: Laughs, optionally at another user. Usage: `f.laugh [@user]`

Fun.name: blush
Fun.desc: Blushes, optionally because of another user. Usage: `f.blush [@user]`

Fun.name: yeet
Fun.desc: Yeets another user into orbit. Usage: `f.yeet @user`

Fun.name: dance
Fun.desc: Dances, optionally with another user. Usage: `f.dance [@user]`

Fun.name: 8ball
Fun.desc: Ask the magic 8-ball a yes/no question.

Fun.name: say
Fun.desc: Make the bot say something.

Fun.name: joke
Fun.desc: Tells a random joke.

Fun.name: mock
Fun.desc: Mock a message. Example: hello. Output: hElLo

Fun.name: love
Fun.desc: Measures the love between you and the tagged user.

Fun.name: list
Fun.desc: Lists the server's ragebait leaderboard.

Fun.name: remove
Fun.desc: Removes a specific amount of rage points from a user.

Fun.name: set
Fun.desc: Sets a user's rage points to a specific number.

Giveaways.name: start
Giveaways.desc: Starts a server giveaway in the current channel.

Giveaways.name: end
Giveaways.desc: Ends an active giveaway early. Usage: `f.giveaway end <message_id>`

Giveaways.name: reroll
Giveaways.desc: Rerolls a new winner from an ended giveaway. Usage: `f.giveaway reroll <message_id>`

Giveaways.name: list
Giveaways.desc: Lists all active giveaways in the server.

Leveling.name: reward_add
Leveling.desc: Creates a level reward role. Usage: `f.level reward_add <level> <@role>`

Leveling.name: reward_remove
Leveling.desc: Removes a level reward role. Usage: `f.level reward_remove <level>`

Leveling.name: reward_list
Leveling.desc: Lists all level reward roles. Usage: `f.level reward_list`

Leveling.name: ignore_add
Leveling.desc: Blocks XP in a channel. Usage: `f.level ignore_add [#channel]`

Leveling.name: ignore_remove
Leveling.desc: Unblocks XP in a channel. Usage: `f.level ignore_remove [#channel]`

Moderation.name: kick
Moderation.desc: Kicks the specified user from the server if you have permission.

Moderation.name: soft
Moderation.desc: Bans and unbans the specified user from the server to kick and purge their messages.

Moderation.name: temporary
Moderation.desc: Bans the specified user from the server for a temporary period.

Moderation.name: clear
Moderation.desc: Remove a specific warning by its ID or clear all warnings.

Moderation.name: list
Moderation.desc: List all warned users or view specific user infractions.

Moderation.name: user
Moderation.desc: Purges messages from a specific user.

Moderation.name: embeds
Moderation.desc: Purges messages with embeds or attachments.

Moderation.name: nuke
Moderation.desc: Nukes a channel by cloning it and deleting the old one.

Moderation.name: userinfo
Moderation.desc: Returns information about the mentioned/replyed person

Moderation.name: purge
Moderation.desc: Kanaldan belirtilen sayıda mesajı siler (komut mesajı dahil).

Moderation.name: warn
Moderation.desc: Kullanıcıya uyarı verir ve veritabanına kaydeder.

Moderation.name: vmove
Moderation.desc: Kullanıcıyı başka bir ses kanalına taşır. Kullanım: `f.vmove @kullanıcı #kanal [sebep]`

Moderation.name: create_channel
Moderation.desc: Yeni bir metin kanalı oluşturur. Kullanım: `f.create_channel <isim>`

Nsfw.name: bdsm
Nsfw.desc: Queries premium BDSM networks for uncensored media.

Nsfw.name: hentai
Nsfw.desc: Returns high-resolution uncensored Japanese hentai and anime art.

Nsfw.name: feet
Nsfw.desc: Displays ultra high-definition foot fetish gallery uploads.

Nsfw.name: rule34
Nsfw.desc: Connects directly to the rule34 API to fetch the latest artwork.

Owner.name: givemoney
Owner.desc: Gives wallet coins to a user.

Owner.name: takemoney
Owner.desc: Takes wallet coins from a user.

Owner.name: ecoban
Owner.desc: Bans a user from the economy system.

Owner.name: ecounban
Owner.desc: Unbans a user from the economy system.

Owner.name: botban
Owner.desc: Bans a user from using the bot entirely.

Owner.name: botunban
Owner.desc: Unbans a user from the bot.

Owner.name: sync
Owner.desc: Syncs application (slash) commands to the current guild or globally.

Role_sync.name: sync_roles
Role_sync.desc: Sunucudaki tüm üyelerin mevcut rollerini Web UI için senkronize eder.

Suggestions.name: channel
Suggestions.desc: Sets the server suggestions channel. Usage: `f.suggest channel #kanal`

Suggestions.name: consider
Suggestions.desc: Marks suggestion as under consideration. Usage: `f.suggest consider <id> [reason]`

Tickets.name: setup
Tickets.desc: Deploys the ticket open panel. Usage: `f.ticket setup`

Tickets.name: category
Tickets.desc: Sets the category for ticket channels. Usage: `f.ticket category <category_id>`

Tickets.name: support
Tickets.desc: Sets the support staff role. Usage: `f.ticket support <@role>`

Tickets.name: log
Tickets.desc: Sets the transcript log channel. Usage: `f.ticket log <#channel>`

Tickets.name: add
Tickets.desc: Adds a member to an existing ticket. Usage: `f.ticket add <@user>`

Tickets.name: remove
Tickets.desc: Removes a member from a ticket channel. Usage: `f.ticket remove <@user>`

Utils.name: owners
Utils.desc: Returns the owners of the bot.

Utils.name: banner
Utils.desc: Returns the displayed banner of the mentioned/replyed person

Utils.name: avatar
Utils.desc: Returns the displayed avatar of the mentioned/replyed person

Utils.name: about
Utils.desc: Returns statistics and details about the bot.

Permissions.name: grant
Permissions.desc: Bir role bot komutu izni verir.

Permissions.name: revoke
Permissions.desc: Bir rolden bot komutu iznini kaldırır.

Permissions.name: check_perms
Permissions.desc: Bir rolün sahip olduğu bot izinlerini listeler.

Settings.name: set
Settings.desc: Log kanalını ayarlar. (mesaj, ses, uyari, ticket, mod, basvuru, davet, sunucu, rol)
